---
name: Documentation
about: Report an issue with documentation or suggest improvements
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: ['documentation']
assignees: ''
---

## 📖 Documentation Issue

**Which documentation needs attention?**

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] Contributing guidelines
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Build system documentation
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🔍 Issue Type

**What kind of documentation issue is this?**

- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Unclear/confusing content
- [ ] Outdated content
- [ ] Formatting issues
- [ ] Broken links
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📍 Location

**Where is the issue located?**
Please provide:

- File name and path
- Section heading
- Line numbers (if applicable)
- URL (if applicable)

## ❌ Current Content

**What is currently documented?**
Please quote the current content or describe what's there now.

## ✅ Suggested Improvement

**What should it say instead?**
Please provide your suggested improvement or addition.

## 🎯 Justification

**Why is this change needed?**
Explain how this will help users or improve the documentation.

## 📋 Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references that would be helpful.
